zh.lifeSummary: Flower Pearson於1582年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾牛頓。她和William Whitby至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1624年1月享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾哈爾斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Flower Pearson于1582年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾牛頓。她和William Whitby至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1624年1月享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾哈爾斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Pearson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Per(e) or Piers (see Pear and Pierce ) + son. The surname is also quite common in Ireland, where it has been established for many centuries. Compare Peerson .
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames.

variants.name: Peerson
meanings: Altered form of English   Pearson   and of English or North German   Pierson  .

Americanized form of Swedish Peersson: patronymic from the personal name Peer, a variant of Per, vernacular shortened form of Peter . The surname Peersson is not found in Sweden anymore (compare Persson ).
Americanized form of Norwegian or Danish Peersen, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Pear
meanings: English: topographic name from residence by a pear tree (Middle English pere, Old English peru, pere). Compare Perry .
English: nickname from Middle English pere, Old French per, peer ‘peer or paragon’, also ‘companion’.

variants.name: Pierson
meanings: North German: patronymic from the personal name Pier, a variant of Peer, vernacular shortened form of Peter . Compare Peerson .

History: Born in Yorkshire, England, Abraham Pierson (1609–78) was the first pastor of the settlements at Southampton, Long Island, NY; Branford, CT, and Newark, NJ. He left his library of more than 400 books, one of the most extensive in the colonies, to his son Abraham, who was one of the first trustees of Yale College.

nameMeanings.name: Flower
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word (from Old French;  compare  Fleur  ), which is also sometimes used as a term of endearment.

en.lifeSummary: Flower Pearson was born in 1582, in Newton, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with William Whitby. She died in January 1624, at the age of 42, and was buried in Harston, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Flower Pearson est née en 1582, à Newton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec William Whitby. Elle est décédée en janvier 1624, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Harston, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Flower Pearson wurde 1582 in Newton, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit William Whitby mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Januar 1624 im Alter von 42 Jahren und wurde in Harston, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Flower Pearson è nata il nel 1582 nel Newton, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con William Whitby. Morì nel gennaio 1624, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Harston, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Flower Pearsonは1582年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアニュートンで生まれた。彼女はWilliam Whitbyとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1624年1月に42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアハーストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Flower Pearson(은)는 1582년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 뉴턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 William Whitby(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1624년 1월 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 하르스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Flower Pearson nasceu em 1582, em Newton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com William Whitby. Ela faleceu em janeiro de 1624, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Harston, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Flower Pearson родилась в 1582 г. в местности нютон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от William Whitby. Она умерла январь 1624 г. в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности харстон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Flower Pearson nació en 1582, en Newton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con William Whitby. Murió en enero de 1624, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Harston, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
